title: AgentTurnResponse
description: Strict structured-output shape the LLM must return. On parse failure the worker retries up to 2x with a fix-your-JSON reprompt; on the 3rd failure the conversation escalates to human_handoff and the turn is DLQ'd.

next_phase.description: Next state-machine phase. Worker re-validates against allowed transitions from the current phase.

reply_text.description: Customer-facing reply. SMS-friendly; multi-segment is allowed but flagged.

intents.description: Structured actions the orchestrator must execute (search_slots, hold_slot, request_owner_confirm, etc.).

args.description: Free-form per-intent args; validated downstream against per-intent schemas.

confidence.description: Self-reported model confidence; below business.human_handoff_threshold triggers escalation.

cost_micros.description: Per-turn cost in micros (1_000_000 = $1.00); summed into llm_cost_daily for ceiling enforcement.

model.description: Actual model used for this turn — may differ from configured default after cheap-mode degradation.
